title: Search using numeric column type

posts.author: anamariaelsal (Ana Maria de Espinoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
Is there any chance to make numeric columns available for searching items in a board? So far, only text column type allows this functionality.
Giving more context: I have an ID (automated) column for tasks in a dev board. Each tasks is identified with that code. However, when I do a search by this specific code, nothing is retrieved. If I don´t use that automated column, but another ID based on characters different to numbers, then the search works, which makes me understand that only text column type are used in the search .

Please advise. Thanks!
